name: ai-support-agent
description: A collection of agents, commands, skills, and safety guidance for AI-assisted software development, bundled by default with ai-support-agent-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Use bundled development skills and workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: AI Support Agent provides reusable software development skills and workflow prompts for planning, implementation, review, testing, and documentation work.
defaultPrompt: Use the add-feature workflow for this request.
Review this change with the bundled reviewers.
Plan this implementation before editing code.
